basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute, Regional Station Kalimpong
basic_details.short_information: IARI Kalimpong is recruiting 01 Young Professional-I for project-related field and laboratory work. Graduates in Agriculture, Botany, Forestry or Life Sciences can apply. Last date is 07 August 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum 21 years and Maximum 45 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation applicable as per Government of India / ICAR rules.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Minimum 21 years and Maximum 45 years (relaxation as per GOI/ICAR rules)
qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Agriculture or B.Sc. in Botany / Forestry / Life Sciences from a recognized university

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Walk-in Interview on 13 August 2026 at IARI Regional Station
Kalimpong. Shortlisted candidates will be informed. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of interview.
how_to_apply: Attach self-attested copies of all certificates and documents.
Send the scanned PDF via email to [email protected] by 07 August 2026.
Shortlisted candidates will attend the walk-in interview on 13 August 2026 at 10:00 AM at Conference Hall, IARI-Kalimpong.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidate will have no claim for regular appointment at ICAR-IARI. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The Director reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR-IARI Kalimpong YP-I Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR-IARI Kalimpong YP-I Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute, Regional Station Kalimpong invites applications for engagement of Young Professional-I on contractual basis. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. Candidates are advised to read the full notice carefully before applying. Download ICAR-IARI Kalimpong YP-I Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IARI Kalimpong is recruiting 01 Young Professional-I for project-related field and laboratory work. Graduates in Agriculture, Botany, Forestry or Life Sciences can apply. Last date is 07 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: B.Sc. in Agriculture or B.Sc. in Botany / Forestry / Life Sciences from a recognized university

Practical field survey experience, laboratory skills (physical, biochemical, microbial analysis), data analysis, report writing, MS Office proficiency, and ability to speak Nepali/Bengali besides Hindi & English
Minimum 21 years and Maximum 45 years (relaxation as per GOI/ICAR rules)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum 21 years and Maximum 45 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation applicable as per Government of India / ICAR rules.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Walk-in Interview on 13 August 2026 at IARI Regional Station, Kalimpong. Shortlisted candidates will be informed. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the prescribed application format (Annexure-I). Attach self-attested copies of all certificates and documents. Send the scanned PDF via email to [email protected] by 07 August 2026. Shortlisted candidates will attend the walk-in interview on 13 August 2026 at 10:00 AM at Conference Hall, IARI-Kalimpong.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IARI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidate will have no claim for regular appointment at ICAR-IARI. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The Director reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IARI Kalimpong Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 07 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Young Professional vacancies are available at IARI Kalimpong?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Young Professional-I (YP-I).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Young Professional-I at IARI Kalimpong?
faq.answer: The consolidated emolument is ₹30,000/- per month (fixed, no HRA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IARI Kalimpong YP-I post?
faq.answer: B.Sc. in Agriculture or B.Sc. in Botany / Forestry / Life Sciences from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IARI Kalimpong Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: Minimum 21 years and maximum 45 years (with relaxation as per GOI/ICAR rules).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for ICAR-IARI Kalimpong YP-I position?
faq.answer: Send the filled application format along with self-attested documents as a scanned PDF to [email protected] by 07 August 2026.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview for IARI Kalimpong Young Professional?
faq.answer: The interview is scheduled on 13 August 2026 at 10:00 AM at IARI Regional Station, Kalimpong.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable skills for IARI Kalimpong YP-I?
faq.answer: Field survey experience, laboratory analysis skills, report writing, MS Office, and knowledge of Nepali/Bengali languages.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Young Professional position at IARI Kalimpong permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a purely temporary contractual position co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. What are the core responsibilities of YP-I at IARI Kalimpong?
faq.answer: Field surveys, sample collection, laboratory analysis, report writing, and extension work with farming communities.
